canonical_answer: A hand dips rectangular brown biscuits into a glass container filled with dark liquid. The soaked biscuits are arranged in a vertical column on a white plate with a red rim. A yellow bowl rests on the wooden countertop nearby. A pink spoon lies inside a small dark bowl containing brown substance. Small brown crumbs scatter across the white plate surface.

question: Describe the sequence of events shown from the start of the clip until the ingredient is presented.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a woman in a red cardigan introduces the segment against a yellow wall; at 6s, text appears announcing a no-oven Christmas log cake recipe; at 14s, the woman stands in the kitchen holding a yellow bowl containing brown chestnut cream with a pink spoon inside.

question: Walk through the visible text overlays and setting changes observed in the first fifteen seconds.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the Figaro Live logo appears while intro text displays at the bottom; at 6s, overlay text specifies a Christmas log cake without oven or microwave; at 14s, yellow text identifies chestnut cream as the woman holds a bowl with a pink spoon in the kitchen area.
